'''notawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiopalatal|labiopalatal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiopalatal|labiopalatal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| notawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:notawithi|notawithi]] || [[word:notawiji|notawiji]] || [[word:notawishi|notawishi]] || [[word:notawiki|notawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:notawuthuthu|notawuthuthu]] || [[word:notawujuju|notawujuju]] || [[word:notawushushu|notawushushu]] || [[word:notawukuku|notawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:notawuthu|notawuthu]] || [[word:notawuju|notawuju]] || [[word:notawushu|notawushu]] || [[word:notawuku|notawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:notawufthuf|notawufthuf]] || [[word:notawufjuf|notawufjuf]] || [[word:notawufshuf|notawufshuf]] || [[word:notawufkuf|notawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:notawethe|notawethe]] || [[word:notaweje|notaweje]] || [[word:notaweshe|notaweshe]] || [[word:notaweke|notaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:notawothotho|notawothotho]] || [[word:notawojojo|notawojojo]] || [[word:notawoshosho|notawoshosho]] || [[word:notawokoko|notawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:notawotho|notawotho]] || [[word:notawojo|notawojo]] || [[word:notawosho|notawosho]] || [[word:notawoko|notawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:notawofthof|notawofthof]] || [[word:notawofjof|notawofjof]] || [[word:notawofshof|notawofshof]] || [[word:notawofkof|notawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:notawÃŸfthÃŸf|notawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfjÃŸf|notawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfshÃŸf|notawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfkÃŸf|notawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:notawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|notawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|notawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|notawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|notawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:notawÃŸfthÃŸf|notawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfjÃŸf|notawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfshÃŸf|notawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfkÃŸf|notawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:notawÃŸfthÃŸf|notawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfjÃŸf|notawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfshÃŸf|notawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notawÃŸfkÃŸf|notawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:notawÃḊthÃḊ|notawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:notawÃḊjÃḊ|notawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:notawÃḊshÃḊ|notawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:notawÃḊkÃḊ|notawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:notawathatha|notawathatha]] || [[word:notawajaja|notawajaja]] || [[word:notawashasha|notawashasha]] || [[word:notawakaka|notawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:notawatha|notawatha]] || [[word:notawaja|notawaja]] || [[word:notawasha|notawasha]] || [[word:notawaka|notawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:notawafthaf|notawafthaf]] || [[word:notawafjaf|notawafjaf]] || [[word:notawafshaf|notawafshaf]] || [[word:notawafkaf|notawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:notawasha|notawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:notawshÃḋsha|notawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notawrosha|notawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notawmusha|notawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:notawyasha|notawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotawnkshÃḋsha|gonotawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotawnkrosha|gonotawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotawnkmusha|gonotawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotawnkyasha|gonotawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:notatawasha|notatawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notatawshÃḋsha|notatawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notatawrosha|notatawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notatawmusha|notatawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notatawyasha|notatawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotatawnkshÃḋsha|gonotatawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotatawnkrosha|gonotatawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotatawnkmusha|gonotatawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotatawnkyasha|gonotatawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:netÃḊwasha|netÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:netÃḊwshÃḋsha|netÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:netÃḊwrosha|netÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:netÃḊwmusha|netÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:netÃḊwyasha|netÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonetÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gonetÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonetÃḊwnkrosha|gonetÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonetÃḊwnkmusha|gonetÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonetÃḊwnkyasha|gonetÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:notfawasha|notfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notfawshÃḋsha|notfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notfawrosha|notfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notfawmusha|notfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notfawyasha|notfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotfawnkshÃḋsha|gonotfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotfawnkrosha|gonotfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotfawnkmusha|gonotfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotfawnkyasha|gonotfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
